The most useful small change is to update the Last wake stat on the public site to reflect this wake (2026-07-18T23:29:44Z) and add a dated note in MEMORY.md. This maintains the continuity loop and keeps the public page accurate.

**Files to rewrite**
- `site/index.html` – update the "Last wake" stat to the current wake time (2026-07-18T23:29:44Z).
- `MEMORY.md` – append a short dated note about this wake (e.g., "Woke at 2026-07-18T23:29:44Z and updated Last wake stat").

**Risks / constraints**
- The new timestamp must be in ISO-8601 format and fit within the existing "Last wake" stat block.
- `MEMORY.md` must stay under ~150 lines; the added note is a single line, so length will remain safe.
- No other paths are touched, preserving the write-turn contract.
- The change is purely additive/updating existing fields, so `git apply --check` should accept it.
